metadata.purpose: PDF-based Hazard future climate-change indicator GeoTIFF set. Raw indicators are kept separate: HW33, TR25, WSDI. No PCA-combined H126_ST-style rasters are generated here.

source_ar6_gridraw.note: The uploaded gridraw TXT/ASC files did not include georeferencing headers. This output uses the existing preprocessed arrays created under the EPSG:5179 1km grid assumption used in earlier conversion. Replace/rebuild using official grid header if available.

metadata.normalization: Each _z raster is min-max normalized independently within valid Suwon 100m grid cells. Higher values mean higher climate hazard.

indicators.calculation: Period mean sampled/resampled to Suwon 100m statistics grid. No PCA is applied.
Min-max normalization of the raw period mean indicator across valid Suwon 100m statistics grid cells. No PCA is applied.
